## Why

Explain why this change is needed and how it supports the MQTT-first scope.

## Behavior Contract

- Does this PR change request parsing, response key names, route shapes, or matching semantics?
  - [ ] no
  - [ ] yes (explain below)

If yes, explain compatibility impact and migration path.

## Test Coverage

- [ ] Tests updated at the correct layer (`unit`, `route`, `black-box`, optional `mqtt integration`)
- [ ] No duplicate assertion layers were introduced

## Documentation

- [ ] Docs updated for any API/CLI/behavior changes
- [ ] MQTT protocol terms (`topic`, `topic filter`) and JMESTrap terms (`event type`) are used consistently

## Scope Check

- [ ] Change is aligned with README scope/non-goals
- [ ] No out-of-scope transport/API expansion was introduced
